zhvi.label: Zillow Home Value Index (mid-tier, smoothed, SA) — 2026-04-30

zori.label: Zillow Observed Rent Index (all homes, smoothed) — 2026-04-30

redfin.label: Redfin Data Center, metro median sale price (All Residential, 30-day) — 2026-03-31

note: Gross rental yield = (ZORI monthly rent x 12) / ZHVI home value. HUD Fair Market Rents were considered as a fourth source but excluded: FMR is a 40th-percentile voucher-determination figure, not a market median, and would systematically understate yields if mixed with median-based sources.
